seoDescription: Anlogic FPGA solutions for industrial control, communication, video processing, and AI acceleration. Complete design solutions and technical support.

faqs.question: What solutions does Anlogic provide?
faqs.answer: Anlogic provides comprehensive FPGA solutions for industrial control, communication infrastructure, video processing, and AI edge computing. Each solution includes reference designs, IP cores, development kits, and technical documentation to accelerate product development.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact FAE for solution recommendations based on your application requirements.

faqs.question: Are reference designs available?
faqs.answer: Yes, Anlogic provides complete reference designs for common applications including industrial controllers, communication gateways, video processors, and AI accelerators. Reference designs include schematics, PCB layouts, source code, and documentation.
faqs.decisionGuide: Reference designs accelerate product development and reduce time-to-market.

faqs.question: Does Anlogic offer customization services?
faqs.answer: Yes, Anlogic offers IP core customization and design services for specific application requirements. Contact FAE to discuss customization needs and project requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact FAE for customization requirements and project discussion.

faqs.question: What technical support is available?
faqs.answer: Anlogic provides comprehensive technical support including documentation, software tools, training materials, and FAE support. LiTong as authorized distributor provides local technical support and design services.
faqs.decisionGuide: Leverage comprehensive technical support for successful project implementation.

faqs.question: How do I get started with Anlogic solutions?
faqs.answer: Get started with Anlogic solutions by obtaining a development kit and downloading Tang Dynasty software. Start with reference designs for proof of concept, then customize for your specific application requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Start with evaluation kit for proof of concept, then proceed to custom design.

solutions.title: Industrial Control FPGA Solution
solutions.description: Complete FPGA solution for PLC, motion control, and industrial communication based on Anlogic ELF2 series FPGAs
solutions.shortDescription: Industrial control FPGA solution with real-time processing and multi-protocol support
solutions.longDescription: The Industrial Control FPGA Solution provides a complete hardware and software platform for industrial automation applications. Based on Anlogic ELF2 series low-power FPGAs, this solution enables high-performance control algorithms, multi-axis motion control, and industrial communication protocols. The solution includes reference designs for PLC functionality, motor control, and fieldbus interfaces. Key features include deterministic real-time processing with microsecond response times, rich I/O interfaces for sensors and actuators, and support for industrial Ethernet protocols including EtherCAT, Profinet, and Modbus. The solution is ideal for factory automation, process control, and machine control applications with industrial-grade reliability and cost-effective pricing.
coreAdvantages: Single chip for control and communication

components.description: Main processing FPGA for control algorithms

benefits: Reduced development time with reference designs

customerCases.challenge: Needed cost-effective PLC solution with real-time performance
customerCases.solution: Implemented ELF2L45B based PLC with EtherCAT communication
customerCases.result: 40% cost reduction, real-time performance met requirements, successfully mass-produced

customerCases.challenge: Required multi-axis controller with deterministic timing
customerCases.result: Achieved <10us response time, reduced BOM cost by 35%

faqs.question: How many axes can be controlled?
faqs.answer: The solution supports up to 16 axes of motion control with a single FPGA. Supports point-to-point, velocity, and torque control modes with synchronized multi-axis operation.
faqs.decisionGuide: 8 axes or less use ELF2L45B, 8-16 axes use ELF2L90B for higher capacity.

faqs.question: What industrial protocols are supported?
faqs.answer: The solution supports major industrial protocols including EtherCAT master/slave, Profinet, EtherNet/IP, Modbus TCP/RTU, CANopen, and DeviceNet. Protocols are implemented in soft cores with flexible configuration options.
faqs.decisionGuide: Multiple industrial protocols supported to meet different application requirements.

faqs.question: What is the real-time performance?
faqs.answer: FPGA hardware parallel processing achieves control loop periods down to 50us with <10us response time, significantly better than traditional MCU solutions. Suitable for high-precision motion control and process control applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: FPGA solution provides excellent real-time performance for high-precision control requirements.

faqs.question: How long is the development cycle?
faqs.answer: Based on reference designs, typical project cycle is 3-6 months. Anlogic provides complete reference designs and technical support to significantly shorten development time. Complex projects recommend phased development approach.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use reference designs and FAE support to shorten development cycle.

faqs.question: How is reliability ensured?
faqs.answer: Solution uses industrial-grade components rated for -40C to +85C operation. Includes watchdog timers, power monitoring, and fault protection mechanisms. Meets industrial control equipment reliability requirements with comprehensive EMC testing.
faqs.decisionGuide: Industrial-grade components and comprehensive protection mechanisms ensure high reliability.

faeInsights.author: LiTong FAE Team
faeInsights.content: Industrial control is one of the most successful application areas for Anlogic FPGAs. We have helped numerous customers successfully develop PLCs, motion controllers, and industrial gateway products. Key success factors include: 1) Leveraging FPGA parallel processing for real-time control, 2) Proper resource planning to avoid over-design, 3) Paying attention to timing constraints and signal integrity, 4) Thorough testing under various boundary conditions. We recommend customers first validate the solution using development kits before proceeding to product design. Our FAE team provides comprehensive support throughout the development process.
keyTakeaways: FPGA parallel processing enables high-performance control
Timing constraints and signal integrity are critical

solutions.seoTitle: Industrial Control FPGA Solution - Anlogic | LiTong Distributor
solutions.seoDescription: Industrial control FPGA solution based on Anlogic ELF2 series. Real-time processing, multi-protocol support, high reliability.

solutions.title: Communication Interface FPGA Solution
solutions.description: High-performance FPGA solution for protocol conversion, network acceleration, and communication interfaces based on Anlogic EAGLE series
solutions.shortDescription: Communication interface FPGA solution with high-speed SerDes and protocol flexibility
solutions.longDescription: The Communication Interface FPGA Solution enables flexible protocol handling and network acceleration for communication equipment. Based on Anlogic EAGLE series high-performance FPGAs with high-speed transceivers, this solution supports multiple communication standards including 10G Ethernet, PCIe Gen3, and custom protocols. The solution includes reference designs for protocol conversion gateways, network interface cards, and communication accelerators. Key features include multi-gigabit data rates up to 10Gbps per channel, flexible protocol processing with hardware acceleration, and low-latency operation in microseconds. Ideal for telecom equipment, network appliances, 5G small cells, and industrial communication systems requiring high-speed connectivity.
coreAdvantages: Programmable protocols adapt to evolving standards
Integrated PCIe hard IP simplifies design

components.description: High-performance FPGA with SerDes and PCIe hard IP
CPLD for system initialization and configuration

bomList.description: Main FPGA with SerDes and PCIe

benefits: Flexible support for multiple communication protocols
Programmable to adapt to evolving standards

customerCases.challenge: Needed flexible protocol gateway for 5G infrastructure
customerCases.result: 50% cost reduction, faster deployment, passed operator certification

customerCases.challenge: Required high-performance NIC with low latency
customerCases.solution: Developed smart NIC using EG4S20 with PCIe Gen3
customerCases.result: Achieved <1us latency, 40% lower cost than Xilinx solution

faqs.question: What high-speed interfaces are supported?
faqs.answer: The solution supports multiple high-speed interfaces: SerDes (up to 10.3125Gbps), PCIe Gen3 x4, 10G Ethernet, DDR3/4, and SATA. Meets communication equipment requirements for high-speed data transmission.
faqs.decisionGuide: EAGLE series supports mainstream high-speed interfaces for communication applications.

faqs.question: What is the performance for 5G small cells?
faqs.answer: The EAGLE-based 5G small cell solution supports 1T1R/2T2R configurations with Sub-6GHz frequency bands, meeting 5G NR throughput requirements. Supports O-RAN fronthaul interface and integrates with mainstream base station software platforms.
faqs.decisionGuide: EAGLE series FPGAs meet 5G small cell baseband processing requirements.

faqs.question: What protocols are supported for protocol conversion?
faqs.answer: Protocol converter supports: Ethernet (10M/100M/1G/10G), Fiber Channel, CPRI, eCPRI, Interlaken, and custom protocols. Protocol stacks implemented in FPGA with flexible configuration and upgrade capabilities.
faqs.decisionGuide: Supports mainstream communication protocols with customization options for special protocols.

faqs.question: What is the power consumption?
faqs.answer: EAGLE series uses 28nm process with good power control. Typical 5G small cell solution consumes about 2-3W, significantly lower than traditional FPGA solutions. Supports dynamic power management to reduce power during idle periods.
faqs.decisionGuide: EAGLE series has good power control, meeting communication equipment thermal requirements.

faqs.question: What is the development timeline and cost?
faqs.answer: Based on reference designs, typical project cycle is 6-12 months. Compared to high-end Xilinx/Intel FPGAs, device cost is reduced by 50% or more. Anlogic provides free development tools with no licensing fees.
faqs.decisionGuide: Anlogic solutions offer significant advantages in cost and development tools.

faeInsights.author: LiTong FAE Team
faeInsights.content: Communication equipment is a major application direction for Anlogic EAGLE series. We have supported customers in developing 5G small cells, fiber optic transceivers, protocol converters, and other products. Key insights: 1) High-speed SerDes design requires special attention to signal integrity, 2) Timing constraints are critical for high-speed designs, 3) Leverage hard IP (like PCIe) to simplify design, 4) Close cooperation between hardware and software teams improves efficiency. We recommend customers communicate with FAE team early in the design phase to avoid detours. Our team provides comprehensive support from architecture design to production.
keyTakeaways: Signal integrity is crucial for high-speed design
Leverage hard IP to simplify design

solutions.seoTitle: Communication Interface FPGA Solution - Anlogic | LiTong Distributor
solutions.seoDescription: Communication interface FPGA solution based on Anlogic EAGLE series. 5G small cells, fiber transceivers, protocol converters. High-speed SerDes, low latency, flexible protocols.
